name: coding-for-dommies-guide
description: Tweetalige stap-voor-stap CRUD-gids voor PHP, JavaScript, SQLite, MySQL en XAMPP.

scripts.test: npm run test:beginner && npm run test:builder && npm run test:release
scripts.release:check: npm test && npm run test:starters && npm run build && npm run test:dist && npm audit --audit-level=moderate
